title: derris hedyosma
intro: Derris hedyosma, also known as Andira inermis, is a plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae and is native to tropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antihelmintic properties. The health benefits of Derris hedyosma include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and various types of infections, as well as its use as a natural remedy for parasitic worm infections. Herbal preparations of Derris hedyosma can be found in the form of extracts, teas, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties.
